1694470.name: Crazy Hands
1694470.description:
This is a simple game, but with very serious controls.

In this game you can:
  • walk
  • move your hand in all three dimensions
  • rotate your hand
  • clench and unclench your fingers

Perhaps you will quickly get the hang of taking a toy cube and putting it somewhere else.
But what about bigger challenges in this hand simulator?
  • Play the piano?
  • Feed the baby?
  • Win volleyball?
  • Do the work of a surgeon?
  • Play with your beloved dog?

The game has many different levels from life. But with a new gaming experience.
